scripts.postman:generate: npm run openapi:generate && node scripts/generate-postman-suite.js && node scripts/split-postman-tracks.js
scripts.postman:test: npm run postman:generate && npm run postman:ensure-admin && npx newman run postman/neobazaar-backend-full.collection.json -e postman/neobazaar-backend-full.environment.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/v1 --reporters cli,json,junit --reporter-json-export reports/postman/newman-report.json --reporter-junit-export reports/postman/newman-report.xml --timeout-request 30000 --timeout-script 30000
scripts.postman:test:strict: npm run postman:generate && npm run postman:ensure-admin && npx newman run postman/neobazaar-backend-strict-happy.collection.json -e postman/neobazaar-backend-full.environment.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/v1 --reporters cli,json,junit --reporter-json-export reports/postman/newman-report.strict.json --reporter-junit-export reports/postman/newman-report.strict.xml --timeout-request 30000 --timeout-script 30000
scripts.postman:test:resilience: npm run postman:generate && npm run postman:ensure-admin && npx newman run postman/neobazaar-backend-resilience-negative.collection.json -e postman/neobazaar-backend-full.environment.json --env-var baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:5050/api/v1 --reporters cli,json,junit --reporter-json-export reports/postman/newman-report.resilience.json --reporter-junit-export reports/postman/newman-report.resilience.xml --timeout-request 30000 --timeout-script 30000
